goal: Ship v7.1 Context and Reference Integrity as a release-grade runtime gate.
risk: AOF can answer from stale, hidden, or unresolved context while appearing release-ready.
loss_boundary: Do not claim v7.1 release readiness without context integrity records, external reference integrity records, audit coverage, tests, and Council review evidence.
evidence_plan: schemas, writer commands, audit command, focused runtime tests, release docs, Council review
stop_conditions: stop if new audit cannot fail missing context
